top_signals.title: Fosun Picks Banks for Hong Kong IPO of Club Med Holiday Resort Chain
top_signals.summary: Fosun International Ltd. has picked banks for a planned Hong Kong initial public offering of holiday resort operator Club Med SAS, according to people familiar with the matter.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: UK Fintech Monzo Reports 44% Jump in Profit on Interest Income
top_signals.summary: Monzo Bank Ltd. reported a 44% jump in profit in the year through March, as growth in lending lifted interest income.
